g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the user input stage look like in detail?')
sendPrompt('How does the output mode selector work and what modes exist?')
sendPrompt('How does query generation work in the research agent?')
sendPrompt('What sources does the research agent crawl?')
sendPrompt('What does the user approve at the HITL query checkpoint?')
sendPrompt('How does the outline generator work and how is it mode-aware?')
sendPrompt('How does section drafting with chain-of-thought work?')
sendPrompt('How does the evaluator-optimizer loop improve quality?')
sendPrompt('What does the user review at the outline HITL checkpoint?')
sendPrompt('What output formats does the system produce?')
sendPrompt('How does the article output differ from thesis?')
sendPrompt('What goes into the technical doc output format?')
sendPrompt('How is the blog post output structured?')
sendPrompt('What does the business report output include?')
